abilities.name: Breach Atlas
abilities.text: Once per round, when you finish mapping a live lane, you can record a safer route note and shed 1 Heat from the effort.

abilities.name: Ghost Mile
abilities.text: False routes stand out to you because you have already drawn them all in your head.

abilities.name: Surveyor's Cut
abilities.text: A clean path is never just a path to you; it is stored future leverage.

abilities.name: Rift Script
abilities.text: You annotate hostile ground fast enough that other operatives can use your work before it fades.
